'''âp-f-l-s''' ('''kapaflesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monofocus|monofocus]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monofocus|monofocus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-f-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kapaflesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipaflesoko|thipaflesoko]] || [[word:jipaflesoko|jipaflesoko]] || [[word:shipaflesoko|shipaflesoko]] || [[word:kipaflesoko|kipaflesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupaflesoko|thuthupaflesoko]] || [[word:jujupaflesoko|jujupaflesoko]] || [[word:shushupaflesoko|shushupaflesoko]] || [[word:kukupaflesoko|kukupaflesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupaflesoko|thupaflesoko]] || [[word:jupaflesoko|jupaflesoko]] || [[word:shupaflesoko|shupaflesoko]] || [[word:kupaflesoko|kupaflesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupaflesoko|thupaflesoko]] || [[word:jupaflesoko|jupaflesoko]] || [[word:shupaflesoko|shupaflesoko]] || [[word:kupaflesoko|kupaflesoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopaflesoko|thothopaflesoko]] || [[word:jojopaflesoko|jojopaflesoko]] || [[word:shoshopaflesoko|shoshopaflesoko]] || [[word:kokopaflesoko|kokopaflesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopaflesoko|thopaflesoko]] || [[word:jopaflesoko|jopaflesoko]] || [[word:shopaflesoko|shopaflesoko]] || [[word:kopaflesoko|kopaflesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopaflesoko|thopaflesoko]] || [[word:jopaflesoko|jopaflesoko]] || [[word:shopaflesoko|shopaflesoko]] || [[word:kopaflesoko|kopaflesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚpaflesoko|thĂŚpaflesoko]] || [[word:jĂŚpaflesoko|jĂŚpaflesoko]] || [[word:shĂŚpaflesoko|shĂŚpaflesoko]] || [[word:kĂŚpaflesoko|kĂŚpaflesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapaflesoko|thathapaflesoko]] || [[word:jajapaflesoko|jajapaflesoko]] || [[word:shashapaflesoko|shashapaflesoko]] || [[word:kakapaflesoko|kakapaflesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapaflesoko|thapaflesoko]] || [[word:japaflesoko|japaflesoko]] || [[word:shapaflesoko|shapaflesoko]] || [[word:kapaflesoko|kapaflesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapaflesoko|thapaflesoko]] || [[word:japaflesoko|japaflesoko]] || [[word:shapaflesoko|shapaflesoko]] || [[word:kapaflesoko|kapaflesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
